main.description: List the moderation actions recorded against a subject (account or record). Newest-first, with opaque cursor pagination. The `subject` is normalized to a DID for account-level filtering; `subjectUri` narrows further to record-level actions on a specific URI. Mod or Admin role.

subject.description: Account DID. Strike accounting always rolls up to this DID; record-level actions are reachable via the `subjectUri` filter.

subjectUri.description: Optional AT-URI filter. When set, only record-level actions on this URI are returned.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response.

since.description: Only return actions whose effective_at is at or after this timestamp.

includeRevoked.description: When false, revoked actions are omitted from the response.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor for the next page; absent when this is the last page.

errors.name: SubjectNotFound
errors.description: No subject_actions row has ever been recorded for the given subject DID.
